data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The website is hosted on a robust cloud platform that can handle high traffic volumes, ensuring service reliability and uptime.
data.technical_spec: AWS with auto-scaling groups and load balancers

data.title: Microservices Design
data.description: Utilizes a microservices architecture facilitating independent deployment and scaling of different components.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A CDN is used to deliver content efficiently, ensuring fast load times globally.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA)
data.description: Employs a SPA to enhance loading speeds and improve user interaction by dynamically loading content.

data.title: Secure API Gateway
data.description: APIs are secured and managed through a gateway to ensure data integrity and secure access controls.
